stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the block fuel required for a 2 hours and 24 min - cruise time with a class B multi-engined piston aircraft? The departure aerodrome will be used as an alternate, in nil wind condition. Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Taxi Fuel: 10 L
Normal fuel consumption: 95 L/h
Holding Fuel Consumption: 76 L/h
Departure/Go Around fuel: 40 L
Approach and landing fuel: 20 L
Extra Fuel: 0 L
Discretionary Fuel: 0 L
